prompt: I'm building a patient registration form for a clinic app. It needs three steps: 1) personal info (name, DOB, phone), 2) insurance details (provider, policy number, group number), 3) medical history (allergies as a text list, current medications). Each step should validate with Zod before allowing next. The final submit POSTs to /api/patients. Build this in src/features/patients/components/registration-form.tsx.
